description:
Returns a list of the number of tasks and calendar items per project for each day in the specified date range.
Tasks and calendar items whose start - finish overlap with the specified date range are included in the sums.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Beginning of date range to filter by.

parameters.name: before
parameters.description: End of date range to filter by

parameters.name: limit_per_day
parameters.description: Number of results to return per day

parameters.name: project_owner_type_ids
parameters.description: Filter by project owner type IDs

parameters.name: sort_key
parameters.description: Sort results by a property of projects. Defaults to descending project_event_count.

parameters.name: sort_dir
parameters.description: Sort results in ascending or descending order

projects_count.description: Number of projects with tasks or calendar items on this day

projects.description: List of projects with counts of tasks or calendar items on this day. The size of this list is limited by the `limit_per_day` query parameter. The order of this list is determined by the `sort_key` ...
